title: Begonia scharffii
taxonomy: Begonia scharffii is a species of flowering plant within the family Begoniaceae. This species belongs to the genus Begonia, which consists of over 1,900 known species. The Begonia scharffii is further classified as part of the subgenus Begonia and is native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant's classification also places it within the order Cucurbitales, which is a group of flowering plants that includes various species of vines and trees. As part of the kingdom Plantae, Begonia scharffii is a vascular plant that reproduces through seeds and is adapted to thrive in warm, humid environments.
